about.headline:
Engineer by Training,
Builder by Nature
paragraphsHtml: I hold a Master of Engineering in Robotics & AI from the University of Toronto, alongside dual Bachelor's degrees in Mechanical Engineering and Computing Technology from the University of Ottawa.

Currently working as a Robotics Perception Engineer in Ossining, NY, I specialize in deploying multi-sensor software pipelines on embedded platforms like the NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, developing infrared processing algorithms, and pursuing SLAM and reinforcement learning research.
I've also developed a novel non-destructive testing system capable of detecting micron-scale fatigue cracks — work that has attracted interest from the U.S. Air Force.
Outside the lab, I've captained a competitive ultimate frisbee team to a provincial championship and was a provincial robotics tournament finalist.

roles.title: Robotics Perception Engineer
bullets: Deployed multi-sensor software pipeline on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, designing embedded communication structure (CAN, SPI, I2C) and integrating low-level firmware in Python and C++.
Developed performance-critical infrared processing algorithms including flat-field correction and advanced noise mitigation.
Pursuing SLAM and Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab reinforcement learning policy training.
Developed a novel non-destructive testing system capable of detecting micron-scale fatigue cracks — attracting interest from the U.S. Air Force.

roles.title: Additive Manufacturing Engineering Intern
bullets: Designed and fabricated aerospace-grade components adhering to industry standards and DFAM process.
Conducted research on powder quality, analyzing printing density outcomes based on laser speed, power, and hatch distance.
Leveraged data analytics techniques to enhance marketing and sales decision making.

roles.title: Mechanical Engineering Intern
bullets: Engineered parts, assemblies, and drawings in SolidWorks following the DFA process.
Designed a new protective transportation system for electrical components.
Identified software-related issues and suggested structured repair steps.

hardware.title: Hardware
hardware.description: Mechanical design, fabrication, and physical systems.

software.title: Software

hardware.title: Electric UAV for Surveillance
hardware.description: Team lead for the design of a fully electric UAV for image collection and surveillance. Responsible for all stress, strain, and fluid analysis, plus the planetary gearbox drivetrain and power unit.
hardware.result: Grade A+ · Planetary gearbox capable of 2× the maximum UAV lift force.

hardware.title: CO₂ Electrolyzer Feed System
hardware.description: Engineered a continuous material handling system for precise KHCO₃ solution delivery into a CO₂ electrolyzer, enabling sustainable carbon capture research.
hardware.result: Stable, continuous-flow system supporting active electrolyzer operation.

software.title: Homography Mapping
software.description: Replaced a CN Tower billboard with the Soldiers' Tower image while maintaining full perspective accuracy. Computed the homography matrix and performed inverse homography warping.
software.result: Successfully maintained perspective with zero distortion artifacts.

software.title: Stereo Vision Depth Estimation
software.description: Depth estimation from pixel coordinates of two offset cameras. Calculated row-wise disparity between pixel kernels and output depth on a colour scale using the inverse disparity relationship.
software.result: Valid pixels: 133,346 · RMS Error: 4.17 · Bad pixel rate: 0.10%

software.title: RRT & RRT* Motion Planning
software.description: Developed both RRT and RRT* algorithms for robot motion planning in obstacle-rich workspaces. Visualized explored paths, obstacles, and optimal routes through workspace graphs.
software.result: Successful paths found on all attempts in under 200 iterations.

software.title: GAN Image Colourization
software.description: Constructed a Generative Adversarial Network to colourize greyscale images. Used an autoencoder generator with a discriminator to distinguish true from AI-colourized images.
software.result: High-quality colourization with low adversarial loss.

contact.headline: Let's Build Something
contact.body: I'm always open to interesting engineering challenges — robotics, embedded systems, machine learning, or mechanical design. Feel free to reach out.
contact.footerNote: Based in Ottawa, ON · Open to opportunities in robotics, mechatronics & AI
